title: Noom's Stuff
body:
# Noom's Stuff

This resource pack features many small changes, tweaks, and fixes to improve upon vanilla while still staying true to it.

## Notable features
- Revamped GUI
- Variated blocks
- Fixed, animated, distinguishable items
- Clearer water
- Unobsctructive fire, shields, grass, & more
- More vibrant lighting
- Redstone indicators
- Visible progress stages
- 3D ladders, rails, & more
- Reduced volume of loud/annoying sounds
- Fun stuff like smiley TNT, crowns, sun & moon faces, & more
- Fixes to vanilla textures and models
- And many more small tweaks

This pack was initially based on a [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) pack and still has plenty of packs they made in it, so check them out too.
